hero.text: Your future is created by what you do today, not tomorrow.
hero.author: Robert Kiyosaki

aries.general: Today is a day for taking initiative. New opportunities may arise in personal projects.
aries.love: Romantic connections feel exciting and spontaneous today. Be open to new experiences.
aries.career: Focus on leadership; your colleagues will look to you for guidance.

taurus.general: A calm day that favors reflection and planning for your future endeavors.
taurus.love: Communication in relationships is key; make an effort to express your feelings.
taurus.career: Steady progress is expected; stick to your plan and success will follow.

gemini.general: A day filled with social interaction. Be ready to network and meet new people.
gemini.love: Flirty interactions may lead to deep connections; embrace the lightheartedness.
gemini.career: Collaboration is the focus; team efforts will yield great results.

cancer.general: Emotional wellbeing is a priority today; take time for self-care and introspection.
cancer.love: A nurturing presence will strengthen bonds; focus on family and close friends.
cancer.career: Your instincts guide you; trust them in conflict resolution at work.

leo.general: Your natural charisma shines today; people are drawn to your energy.
leo.love: Expect admiration and compliments; don’t shy away from receiving love.
leo.career: Creative projects thrive; share your unique ideas to inspire others.

virgo.general: Attention to detail will serve you well today; verify your facts before moving forward.
virgo.love: Your analytical nature might create misunderstandings; strive for clarity.
virgo.career: Performance reviews or assessments may take place; be confident and prepared.

libra.general: Today is perfect for social activities; reconnect with old friends or family.
libra.love: Balance is essential in relationships; ensure both partners feel valued.
libra.career: Creative collaborations blossom; share your insights and ideas with colleagues.

scorpio.general: Intense emotions might surface today; approach conflicts with empathy.
scorpio.love: Passion is heightened; express your feelings boldly to your partner.
scorpio.career: Your determination shines through challenges; others notice your commitment.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls; consider spontaneous plans or travel opportunities.
sagittarius.love: Love is an exploration; be open to new experiences with your partner.
sagittarius.career: Seek opportunities for professional growth; training might present itself.

capricorn.general: Structure and stability are key; revisit your goals and check your progress.
capricorn.love: Loyalty is essential today; reaffirm your commitment to your loved ones.
capricorn.career: Leadership roles may come your way; be ready to step into a larger responsibility.

aquarius.general: Innovative ideas spark today; don’t hesitate to think outside the box.
aquarius.love: Expect a lively conversation; intellectual stimulation defines your romantic interactions.
aquarius.career: Networking is fruitful; connect with like-minded individuals for future projects.

pisces.general: Embrace your creativity; art or writing may provide an emotional outlet today.
pisces.love: Romantic gestures will strengthen bonds; show your affection generously.
pisces.career: Your intuition may lead you to find solutions for work-related issues.

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today, not tomorrow.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

professional.text: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
professional.author: Zig Ziglar

professional.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
professional.author: Walt Disney

professional.text: You miss 100% of the shots you don’t take.
professional.author: Wayne Gretzky

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
motivation.author: Winston Churchill

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: Live the life you have imagined.
captions.author: Henry David Thoreau

captions.text: Hustle in silence, let your success be your noise.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Stay humble, work hard, be kind.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Make today so awesome, yesterday gets jealous.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
tech.author: Alan Kay

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: Software is a great combination between artistry and engineering.
tech.author: Bill Gates

fun.text: Life is too important to be taken seriously.
fun.author: Oscar Wilde

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I couldn’t figure out why the baseball kept getting bigger. Then it hit me.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I used to play piano by ear, but now I use my hands.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don’t see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: The smallest deed is better than the greatest intention.
faith.author: John Burroughs

faith.text: Faith does not eliminate questions. But faith knows where to take them.
faith.author: Elisabeth Elliot

faith.text: We walk by faith, not by sight.
faith.author: 2 Corinthians 5:7

faith.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

faith.text: Let your faith be bigger than your fear.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, we must not confuse knowledge with understanding.
wisdom.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: It is the mark of an educated mind to be able to entertain a thought without accepting it.
wisdom.author: Aristotle
